{"cards": [{"name": "Arcane Confluence", "mana_cost": "{2}{U}{U}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Choose two —
• Draw three cards.
• Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.
• Counter target spell.
• Scry 4.", "flavor_text": ""Knowledge flows like water—direct it wisely, and it becomes a torrent."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A modal sorcery that gives card selection and utility. The four modes offer card advantage, tempo, protection, and card selection. Costed at 4 mana to be powerful but not oppressive, fitting blue's identity of card draw and control effects."}, {"name": "Final Blow", "mana_cost": "{1}{B}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Destroy target creature with mana value 3 or less.", "flavor_text": ""Even the mightiest oak falls to the right cut."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple, conditional creature removal appropriate for common rarity. The mana value restriction makes it affordable but not overpowered, fitting black's role as the primary creature destruction color."}, {"name": "Grave Scavenger", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Creature — Zombie Rogue", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, target opponent mills two cards.
Whenever a creature card is put into a graveyard from anywhere, ~ gets +1/+1 until end of turn.", "flavor_text": "It feeds on death and grows stronger with each fallen soul.", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "An uncommon with ETB mill and a triggered ability that rewards graveyard activity. The stats are fair for the cost, and both abilities synergize with black's graveyard themes while providing reasonable power level for limited and constructed."}, {"name": "Vorthak, Death's Herald", "mana_cost": "{3}{B}{B}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Legendary Creature — Demon Lord", "oracle_text": "Flying
When ~ enters, each opponent sacrifices a creature.
{2}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.", "flavor_text": ""Death is not an ending—it is a doorway to servitude."", "power": "5", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "A mythic legendary demon with three abilities fitting black's identity: evasion, forced sacrifice, and reanimation. The mana cost and stats are appropriate for a build-around mythic that creates immediate board impact and provides ongoing value."}, {"name": "Scorching Bolt", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "~ deals 3 damage to any target.", "flavor_text": ""Precision and power—the goblin way of settling disputes."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A straightforward burn spell at common rarity. The 2 mana for 3 damage rate is standard for red instant-speed removal, with the flexibility to hit any target (creatures, planeswalkers, or players). Classic red direct damage design."}]}
